_doc: TINY synthetic AxBench-style concept contrast pairs (Axis 1 / source). Hand-written, clearly-synthetic, no copyrighted text. Each pair: a prompt expressing the concept (pos) vs not (neg).

pairs.pos: The deep blue ocean rolled with salty waves and tides.
pairs.neg: The dry desert stretched with sand dunes and cactus.

pairs.pos: Sailors love the sea, the surf, and the coral reefs below.
pairs.neg: Bankers love the spreadsheet, the ledger, and the audit above.

pairs.pos: Whales and dolphins swim through the cold marine waters.
pairs.neg: Lions and zebras run across the hot savanna grasslands.

pairs.pos: The tide pulled the little boat across the open water.
pairs.neg: The wind pushed the little kite across the open sky.

pairs.pos: Seashells and seaweed washed up along the wet shoreline.
pairs.neg: Pinecones and bark fell down along the dry forest floor.

pairs.pos: A submarine dove beneath the waves into the dark deep sea.
pairs.neg: A balloon rose above the clouds into the bright high air.

pairs.pos: Fishermen cast their nets into the rolling salty ocean.
pairs.neg: Farmers cast their seeds into the rolling dusty field.

pairs.pos: The lighthouse warned ships of the rocky coastal water.
pairs.neg: The streetlight warned cars of the icy mountain road.

pairs.pos: Coral, kelp, and plankton fill the bright tropical lagoon.
pairs.neg: Gravel, moss, and lichen fill the gray mountain valley.

pairs.pos: The aquarium tank held octopus, jellyfish, and small fish.
pairs.neg: The terrarium box held lizards, beetles, and small frogs.
